session.assistant:
## Report: `make fast-ci` failed
**Exit code:** 2
**Summary:** Prettier found code style issues in 2 files.
**Failing checks:** - Prettier formatting check: 2 files have code style issues - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5914 passed (with 2 deprecation warnings) - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 30 passed
The CI failure is specifically in the Prettier formatting step. The two markdown files listed above need to be reformatted using Prettier.
